method: Classical decomposition: 24h moving average (trend) + daily average pattern (seasonal)

components.trend: 24h moving average — slight upward drift over 7 days
components.seasonal_daily: Clear daily peak at hours 9-11 and 14-16 (business hours)
components.seasonal_weekly: Friday shows ~5-8% higher peak than Tuesday (consistent with 'chiều thứ Sáu' in brief)
components.residual: Anomalies live here — deviation from trend+seasonal

holiday_note: Holiday pattern (Black Friday, Tết) requires 1+ year of data. Out of scope for capstone. ADR: future work.
